## Summary
Describe the changes introduced by this Pull Request and the reasoning behind them.

## Related Issues
Closes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (no runtime changes)
- [ ] Code refactoring / performance optimization

## Verification Checklist
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated to cover the changes
- [ ] All automated tests pass successfully (`pytest`)
- [ ] Manually verified the functionality (include description of manual test steps below)
- [ ] Clean code conforms to codebase formatting standards
